reviews.comment:
Falta mejorar los baños insuficiente en baños mujeres URGENTE  por respetar a nuetras mujeres URGENTE  eso pasa en todas las estaciones de servicio de YPF tiene lugar de sobras y mejorar el restaurante falta sectores duchas

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms urgently need improvement, especially the women's restrooms. This is a problem at all YPF service stations. There's plenty of space, but the restaurant needs improvement and shower facilities are lacking.

reviews.comment:
Pésimo lugar para hacer una parada, hacer todo lo posible por no parar acá que encima se aprovechan de la lejanía y es carísimo. En 2025 me cobraron $4000 la ficha para el agua caliente, mientras que en La Pampa que suele ser caro pagué $500. En Garayalde son unos SIN VERGÜENZAS y encima está muy descuidado el camino para entrar y salir de los surtidores

(Translated by Google)
Terrible place to stop. Do everything you can to avoid stopping here, as they take advantage of its remoteness and it's incredibly expensive. In 2025, they charged me $4000 for a token for hot water, while in La Pampa, where it's usually expensive, I paid $500. In Garayalde, they are shameless, and on top of that, the road to and from the gas stations is in very poor condition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURveWFpejh3RRAB
